prompt: Implement the Pareto-frontier selection used by a small architecture design-space exploration pass. Complete pareto_frontier() in dse.py. Each candidate has id, latency, energy, and area fields. All three metrics are minimized. A candidate is dominated only when another candidate is no worse in every metric and strictly better in at least one. Return the non-dominated candidate IDs in lexicographic order. Do not mutate the input.
instruction: Complete dse.py so the architecture DSE Pareto selection passes all tests.
